arguments.Description: "Update AppBar with search and favorite buttons for gunluk-dualar (Dualar) tool."
arguments.Instruction: "Add actions (search, show favorites toggle) to the AppBar when toolId is gunluk-dualar."
arguments.TargetContent:
"      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text(
          widget.toolTitle,
          style: const TextStyle(
            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
            color: Colors.white,
            fontSize: 20,
          ),
        ),
        centerTitle: true,
        backgroundColor: isQuran ? const Color(0xFF0C1524) : (_isDark ? const Color(0xFF0A1220) : const Color(0xFF1E5E43)),
        elevation: 0,
        iconTheme: const IconThemeData(color: Colors.white),
        automaticallyImplyLeading: !widget.isTab,
      ),"
arguments.toolAction: "Adding search and favorite actions to appBar in tool_detail_screen.dart"
